Who We Are

Crafting Outdoor Living Spaces in Columbus

Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC started with a simple goal: to provide Columbus homeowners with exceptional hardscaping services. We saw a need for reliable contractors who understood the unique challenges of the Ohio climate and could deliver lasting results.

Our approach is built on meticulous planning, skilled craftsmanship, and open communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using quality materials and proven techniques to ensure your outdoor space looks beautiful for years to come. We take the time to understand your vision and bring it to life with precision and care.

We're proud to be a local business, committed to serving our community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to create outdoor spaces that enhance the beauty and value of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care LLC

Experienced Craftsmen

Years of experience tackling Columbus's unique climate and soil conditions.

Quality Materials

We source durable, weather-resistant materials built to withstand Ohio winters.

Custom Designs

Tailored hardscaping solutions that match your home's style and your personal taste.

Guaranteed Satisfaction

We stand behind our work with a commitment to your complete satisfaction.

Ready to Transform Your Yard?

Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care did an amazing job on our new patio! They helped us design a space that perfectly fits our needs and the quality of the work is outstanding. The crew was professional, courteous, and cleaned up everything meticulously. Highly recommended!

Sarah M. Patio Installation
“

We hired Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care to build a retaining wall in our backyard to address some serious erosion issues. They did a great job and the wall looks fantastic. There was a minor delay due to weather, but they communicated well and kept us informed throughout the process.

David K. Retaining Wall
“

Our driveway was cracked and crumbling after years of Columbus winters. Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care came out and did a fantastic job patching and sealing it. It looks almost new! Great service and fair pricing.

Emily R. Driveway Repair
“

We needed a walkway installed from our driveway to the front porch and Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care provided a fantastic design and installation. The crew was very professional and efficient. We are thrilled with the results.

John L. Walkway Installation
“

Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care built our dream outdoor kitchen! From the initial design to the final installation, they were a pleasure to work with. The quality of the materials and workmanship is exceptional. We highly recommend them!

Jessica P. Outdoor Kitchen
“

We had Ohio Landscaping & Lawn Care install a gas fire pit in our backyard. They did a great job and we've been enjoying it ever since! There was a slight issue with the gas line connection, but they quickly resolved it. Overall, we are very satisfied.

Mike S. Fire Pit Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What type of base is used under a paver patio?
We use a compacted gravel base, typically 4-6 inches thick, to provide a stable and well-draining foundation for your patio.
How long does it take to install a patio?
The installation time depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most patios can be completed within 1-2 weeks.
Do I need a permit for a patio installation?
Depending on the size and location of your patio, a permit may be required. We can assist you with the permit application process.
